An announcement from Matsa Resources Limited ( (AU:MAT) ) is now available.

Patronus Resources Limited, listed on the ASX under the code PTN, has initiated an on-market takeover offer for Matsa Resources Limited. The company has distributed its bidder’s statement to Matsa shareholders via postal and electronic means, providing detailed information about the offer and encouraging shareholders to read the document to make informed decisions.

data.title: Trinex Minerals Secures Waiver for East Yellowknife Project Share Issuance
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Todd River Resources Ltd. ( (AU:TX3) ) is now available.

Trinex Minerals Limited, a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker TX3, has secured a waiver from ASX to extend the deadline for issuing shares related to its acquisition of the East Yellowknife Lithium Project in Canada. The delay in completing the transaction was due to administrative holdups in registering the mineral claims, which are beyond the company’s control. The waiver allows Trinex Minerals to issue the shares by April 26, 2025, or upon the registration of the claims, ensuring the transaction proceeds smoothly despite the delays.

More about Todd River Resources Ltd.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$3.76M

data.title: Standard Chartered Submits 2024 Annual Report to FCA
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Standard Chartered ( (GB:STAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Standard Chartered PLC has announced the submission of its 2024 Annual Report to the Financial Conduct Authority, which will soon be available for inspection. The report will also be accessible on the company’s website, and will be mailed to shareholders with the 2025 Notice of Annual General Meeting around April 1, 2025. This announcement underscores the company’s commitment to transparency and ongoing communication with its stakeholders, potentially impacting investor relations and market positioning.

More about Standard Chartered

Standard Chartered PLC is a leading multinational banking and financial services company, incorporated in England and Wales. The company primarily offers services in personal banking, corporate banking, wealth management, and investment banking, with a strong market focus on Asia, Africa, and the Middle East.

data.title: Groupe Bruxelles Lambert Addresses Imerys Privatization Rumors
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Groupe Bruxelles Lambert ( (GB:0IN2) ) is now available.

Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (GBL) addressed rumors about the possible privatization of Imerys, one of its portfolio companies, stating that they regularly evaluate strategic opportunities for their investments but will not comment on market rumors. This announcement highlights GBL’s commitment to strategic evaluation and value creation within its portfolio, emphasizing its long-term investment approach and potential implications for stakeholders amidst market speculation.

More about Groupe Bruxelles Lambert

Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (GBL) is an investment holding company with a seventy-year history on the stock exchange and a net asset value of €16.3 billion as of September 2024. It is a leading investor in Europe with a focus on long-term value creation and a diverse portfolio of high-quality listed and private assets. GBL is committed to ESG factors as part of its value creation strategy and aims to provide attractive returns to shareholders through increasing net asset value per share, sustainable dividends, and share repurchases. The company is listed on Euronext Brussels and is part of the BEL20 index.

YTD Price Performance: 3.08%

data.title: Aurumin Completes Drilling at Sandstone Iron Project
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Aurumin Ltd. ( (AU:AUN) ) is now available.

Aurumin Limited has completed its drilling program at the Central Sandstone Project, which is part of a due diligence process under an option agreement with Newcam Mineral Pty Ltd. This program tested seven priority targets with 54 holes drilled and aims to evaluate the potential for direct shipping iron ore. The potential joint venture with Newcam could provide up to $7 million in project funding, marking a significant step in advancing Aurumin’s exploration efforts.

More about Aurumin Ltd.

Aurumin Limited is a mining company focused on the exploration and development of mineral resources, particularly iron ore, at its Sandstone Project in Western Australia.

data.title: InterContinental Hotels Group PLC Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from InterContinental Hotels ( (GB:IHG) ).

InterContinental Hotels Group PLC announced the purchase of its own shares, totaling 114,688 ordinary shares, from Merrill Lynch International on the London Stock Exchange. This transaction was conducted according to shareholder authority and aims to reduce the number of shares in circulation by cancelling them, which could potentially enhance shareholder value. The purchase is part of the company’s broader strategy to manage its capital structure effectively and indicates a continued focus on delivering shareholder returns.

More about InterContinental Hotels

InterContinental Hotels Group PLC is a prominent player in the hospitality industry, offering a diverse range of hotel brands and services designed to cater to various market segments, from luxury to mainstream lodging. The company’s global presence and strategic focus on expanding its portfolio through acquisitions and partnerships underscore its commitment to maintaining a competitive edge in the hospitality sector.

data.title: f-code Inc. Reports Strong Financial Growth for 2024, Projects Continued Expansion in 2025
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

f-code Inc. ( (JP:9211) ) just unveiled an update.

f-code Inc. reported consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024, showing significant growth in revenue and operating income compared to the previous year. The company saw a 106.7% increase in revenue, reaching 5,130 million yen, and a 122.2% rise in operating income, amounting to 1,432 million yen. The financial outlook for 2025 predicts continued growth, with revenue expected to reach 10,000 million yen, indicating a 94.9% increase year-on-year. Despite no dividends being declared for 2024 and 2025, the company’s financial position has strengthened with an increase in total assets and equity, reflecting a robust operational performance.

More about f-code Inc.

f-code Inc. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating in the industry with a focus on providing innovative solutions and services. The company’s primary products or services and market focus are not explicitly mentioned in the provided text.

data.title: Mears Group PLC Announces Share Buyback Execution
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mears Group Plc ( (GB:MER) ) has shared an announcement.

Mears Group PLC has executed a share buyback programme, purchasing 174,000 ordinary shares at a consistent price of 370 pence each. These shares will be cancelled as part of the programme announced in January 2025, which so far has seen the company buy back a total of 1,626,003 shares. This move is likely aimed at enhancing shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares, thereby potentially increasing earnings per share and signaling confidence in the company’s financial health.
